html:
Exclusive to:

SeedWrong TurfWrong Season

“An exotic seed that is very demanding on its growing conditions. There's a time and place for everything...”

-

Surprising Seeds can be found in Sunken Chests. The chance to find a Surprising Seed in Sunken Chest is 10% at day 1. It will gradually increase as the day count increases, up to 60% chance at day 150.

Each seed has a turf it needs to be planted on and a season during which it grows. In order to grow into sapling, one of them must be met. Examining a planted Surprising Seed will show dialogue depending on whether the seed is growing or not in its current conditions, allowing the player to discern which seed they have found. When a seed meets the required condition, it will grow after 3 – 7 days.

Once the seed has sprouted into a sapling, it requires both of the conditions to be met. If met, the sapling will turn into a fully grown tree after 8–12 days. The growth time from seed to sapling and from sapling to fully grown tree is not a fixed number. It is randomized every time it is planted.

Fully grown Gloomthorn and Sproutrock will produce their fruits every 12 to 25 days. The timer for regrowth is set upon creation of the seed and will stay the same throughout its lifetime and every harvest. Regrowing the tree will not change its regrowth timer. The regrowth timer will be reduced by 25% in Spring.

Tree Growth Condition Harvest
Season Turf

Gloomthorn		 Winter Marsh Turf
Mud Turf		 x4

Sproutrock		 Summer Rocky Turf
Cave Rock Turf
Cave Fumarole Turf		 x3

Gloomthorn and Sproutrock tree need to be on their preferred turf to produce Nightberries and Geode Fruits.

Gallery

  • Surprising Seed concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

Miscellaneous
"ancienttree_seed"
SeedWrong TurfWrong Season
“There are no surprises, only incomplete data.”
–Wilson
“Huh. That's a weird-looking seed.”
–Willow
“What does little seed want to be when it grow up?”
–Wolfgang
“Its future is unknown. Much like the rest of us.”
–Wendy
“SO SMALL AND VULNERABLE. I SHOULD CRUSH IT”
–WX-78
“It's difficult to identify the species at this stage of development.”
–Wickerbottom
“I know you hope it's a tree, Luce. I do too.”
–Woodie
“How mysterious.”
–Maxwell
“It must be returned tö the earth.”
–Wigfrid
“We want to see what it grows into!”
–Webber
“I wonder what it might grow into?”
–Warly
“Hello, baby friend!”
–Wormwood
“I believe this goes in the dirt.”
–Winona
“I see a seed to sow, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Don't know if too tasty to plant.”
–Wurt
“I need to find just the right spot for this.”
–Walter
“Maybe I could skip ahead and take a peek at what it grows into...”
–Wanda
“I don't think it's getting the required nutrients here.”
–Wilson
“I don't think it likes this type of dirt.”
–Willow
“Little one don't like it here?”
–Wolfgang
“This doesn't feel like its final resting place.”
–Wendy
“PATHETIC ORGANIC UNABLE TO SELF-CORRECT PLACEMENT”
–WX-78
“This may not be a suitable environment for it.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't think this is where it goes.”
–Woodie
“Impudent plant. This patch of ground isn't good enough for you?”
–Maxwell
“Why dö yöu despair? Döes this land nöt suit yöu?”
–Wigfrid
“What's wrong? Don't you like it there?”
–Webber
“This soil doesn't seem to fit its tastes.”
–Warly
“Young friend not like it here”
–Wormwood
“Maybe it ain't in the right spot.”
–Winona
“Not the picky plant's preferred placement?”
–Wortox
“Glorp! Who put Plant's friend wrong place?”
–Wurt
“It just doesn't seem to want to grow here.”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, it doesn't seem to like this type of soil.”
–Wanda
“It seems like it fits in, but it's not yet ready to grow.”
–Wilson
“What's wrong? Is it too cold out? Too hot?”
–Willow
“Maybe try again later, little one.”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps it will grow next season. I can wait.”
–Wendy
“WHAT NOW?”
–WX-78
“Perhaps this is not the right time of year for it to thrive.”
–Wickerbottom
“Maybe it's not growin' season, eh?”
–Woodie
“Patience. It's time will come.”
–Maxwell
“It may yet gröw with the passing öf anöther seasön.”
–Wigfrid
“It's okay, you can grow when you're ready.”
–Webber
“Ah, perhaps it is not yet in season.”
–Warly
“Young friend not ready become big friend”
–Wormwood
“I don't think the time is right.”
–Winona
“What now? Oh, not now.”
–Wortox
“Wrong when, florp!”
–Wurt
“It seems happy there, I guess now I just need to be patient.”
–Walter
“I suppose I'll just have to... ugh... wait.”
–Wanda
“An exotic seed that is very demanding on its growing conditions. There's a time and place for everything...”
-
Surprising Seeds can be found in Sunken Chests. The chance to find a Surprising Seed in Sunken Chest is 10% at day 1. It will gradually increase as the day count increases, up to 60% chance at day 150.
Each seed has a turf it needs to be planted on and a season during which it grows. In order to grow into sapling, one of them must be met. Examining a planted Surprising Seed will show dialogue depending on whether the seed is growing or not in its current conditions, allowing the player to discern which seed they have found. When a seed meets the required condition, it will grow after 3 – 7 days.
Once the seed has sprouted into a sapling, it requires both of the conditions to be met. If met, the sapling will turn into a fully grown tree after 8–12 days. The growth time from seed to sapling and from sapling to fully grown tree is not a fixed number. It is randomized every time it is planted.
Fully grown Gloomthorn and Sproutrock will produce their fruits every 12 to 25 days. The timer for regrowth is set upon creation of the seed and will stay the same throughout its lifetime and every harvest. Regrowing the tree will not change its regrowth timer. The regrowth timer will be reduced by 25% in Spring.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hạt giống Bất ngờ có thể được tìm thấy trong Rương chìm. Cơ hội tìm thấy Hạt giống Bất ngờ trong Rương chìm là 10% vào ngày đầu tiên. Nó sẽ tăng dần khi số ngày tăng lên, cơ hội lên tới 60% vào ngày thứ 150.
